thesis_summary: Bearish bias remains actionable only if the open fails to reclaim 29535-29555 and trades below VWAP into late morning.

checks.label: Open remains near forecast ladder
checks.rationale: The forecast levels are only usable if RTH opens within the current plausible pre-session area.

checks.label: No acceptance above 29555
checks.rationale: Reclaiming 29555 would negate the failed-overnight-high thesis and restore bullish control.

checks.label: Open does not classify as bullish drive
checks.rationale: A gap-and-go or trend-break-up open would invalidate the short-first read.

checks.label: Price below session VWAP
checks.rationale: Short bias needs sellers controlling value after the open, not just a pre-open liquidation.

checks.label: Morning loses 29475 support shelf
checks.rationale: A clean break of the prior close/late-demand shelf confirms downside continuation rather than balance.
